title: The CLI hits 0.1.0 and learns to stream
summary:
The CLI hits stable 0.1.0 with terminal audio playback, two new apps join the community showcase, and the model registry gets an under-the-hood upgrade.

The polli CLI officially dropped its alpha tag. Version 0.1.0 brings default real-time text streaming, perfectly sized terminal tables, and a new `--play` flag that pipes audio directly to your speakers. We also fixed the npm publish pipeline so you don't get stuck on old releases, and threw in a Claude skill for generating video demos.

Two new community apps sprouted in the showcase. Flashlearn turns documents into true/false flashcards and AI audio lessons for desktop study sessions. Ciel AI is a mobile-first assistant running entirely on our infrastructure, proving you can build full-featured mobile apps without managing your own backend.

We decoupled some internal logic in the model registry to ensure top-tier text and image models remain highly available and sustainable for the long haul.
